sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24207" key="despoti/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεσποτ-ίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δεσπότης,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.24</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
